raw_consumer_statement: I made an online purchase {$230.00} on XX/XX/XXXX from what I thought was a legit company-XXXX selling basketball toys. They took my money, then a few days later, told me it might take up to 30 days to receive the items. I said to cancel it if they can not get it there by XX/XX/XXXX because it was XXXX presents. They kept giving me the runaround-only answering in emails XXXX or 3 days later-no phone number to call. I contacted my XXXX XXXX and XXXX to them what happened-I was told they would investigate it with them and remove the money from them and put it back on my card. XX/XX/XXXX I was told by XXXX that they were closing the dispute. I don't know why or what the company told them. I have multiple emails from XXXX saying my order is still being processed ... .almost 2 months now. This is rediculous. I have told XXXX multiple times in my messages to cancel the order because it wasn't delivered in a reasonable amount of time. I have sent the information to XXXX and XXXX them the same thing, but as of today they said they were closing my dispute????? I filed a complaint with XXXX and negative reviews. My credit card company told me originally, they would refund the money, but they just had to go through the process.
